description_long: This hammer features a large, double-sided wooden head with a light tan finish and bold red and white geometric patterns running along the top and sides. One side of the head displays a playful face with X-shaped eyes and a smile, while the opposite side is marked with the phrase 'LOVE IS MERELY MADNESS' and a diamond motif. The side of the head also features a colorful illustration of a jester or clown character. The handle is long, slender, and wrapped in a dark blue material, ending in a black, bulbous grip for enhanced handling. The overall design is whimsical and decorative, suggesting a novelty or themed hammer rather than a standard tool.
description: A whimsical, double-sided wooden hammer with bold red and white patterns, playful graphics, and a blue-wrapped handle with a black grip.
description_view_0: Front view shows the double-sided wooden head with red and white geometric stripes and the blue handle with a black grip.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the 'LOVE IS MERELY MADNESS' text and diamond motif on the head, with the handle extending downward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the same geometric pattern as the front, but also features a colorful jester illustration on the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the playful face with X-shaped eyes and a smile on the head, with the handle visible below.
attribute_handle_type: Long, straight handle wrapped in dark blue fabric or rubberized material, ending in a black, bulbous rubber grip for enhanced ergonomics and slip resistance.
attribute_head_type: Large, double-sided rectangular wooden head with flat striking faces, decorated with red and white geometric patterns and graphic illustrations; resembles a novelty or cartoon mallet rather than a standard hammer type.
attribute_brand_or_logo: No brand name or manufacturer logo visible; decorative text 'LOVE IS MERELY MADNESS' and graphic motifs present.
